title: urtica bullata subsp. lombok
intro: Urtica bullata subsp. lombok, also known as Lombok nettle, is a subspecies of Urtica bullata, a plant in the nettle family (Urticaceae). It is a tropical plant native to Indonesia, particularly on the island of Lombok, known for its medicinal properties and potential health benefits. Urtica bullata subsp. lombok has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent.
